name: RTreeEventArgs
summary: Represents event data that is passed when an item that meets certain criteria is found and the passed RTree event is raised.

properties.name: Cancel
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if the search should be conducted farther.

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: Gets the identifier of the found item.

properties.name: IdB
properties.summary: If search is using two r-trees, IdB is element b in the search.

properties.name: IdBPtr
properties.summary: If search is using two r-trees, IdB is the element b pointer in the search.

properties.name: IdPtr
properties.summary: Gets the identifier pointer of the found item.

properties.name: SearchBoundingBox
properties.summary: Bounding box bounds used during a search. You may modify the box in a search callback to help reduce the bounds to search.

properties.name: SearchSphere
properties.summary: Sphere bounds used during a search. You can modify the sphere in a search callback to help reduce the bounds to search.

properties.name: Tag
properties.summary: Gets or sets an arbitrary object that can be attached to this event args. This object will "stick" through a single search and can represent user-defined state.
